untranslatable_reason: Signal requires multi-timeframe analysis with lower timeframe confluence validation (prior bar breakout + support/resistance + swing point alignment on lower timeframe). The framework does not support cross-timeframe indicator comparisons or dynamic lower timeframe thresholds. Parameters 'lower_timeframe_ratio', 'required_confluence_signals', and 'bars_back_for_support_resistance' lack specific numeric values marked as [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] and cannot be operationalized without additional context.
translation_notes: Translated primary breakout logic (price above/below prior bar extremes) into basic conditions. The core signal intent—validating breakouts via lower timeframe confluence—requires multi-timeframe backtesting capability not available in this single-timeframe rule engine. Consider: (1) implementing separate lower timeframe rules and filtering entries, (2) using pivot levels (pivot, s1, r1) as proxy for support/resistance, or (3) adding ADX + volume confluence (vol_ratio_20) to approximate multi-timeframe confluence.
